code:
gantt
    title Multi-Agent Workflow Execution Timeline
    dateFormat X
    axisFormat %M:%S
    tickInterval 30second

    section 🔍 Research Agent
    Environment Setup     :r1, 0, 30
    Data Collection       :r2, 20, 90
    Source Analysis       :r3, 70, 120
    Findings Summary      :r4, 110, 150

    section ✍️ Writing Agent
    Template Preparation  :w1, 40, 70
    Draft Creation        :w2, 120, 200
    Content Structure     :w3, 180, 240
    Style Refinement      :w4, 220, 280

    section 👁️ Review Agent
    Quality Guidelines    :rv1, 50, 80
    Initial Review        :rv2, 200, 260
    Feedback Generation   :rv3, 240, 300
    Final Approval        :rv4, 280, 320

    section 📊 Analysis Agent
    Metrics Setup         :a1, 60, 90
    Performance Monitor   :a2, 150, 350
    Quality Assessment    :a3, 260, 310
    Report Generation     :a4, 300, 340

    section 🎯 Coordination Points
    Research Handoff      :milestone, m1, 149, 151
    Draft Ready           :milestone, m2, 239, 241
    Review Complete       :milestone, m3, 299, 301
    Final Delivery        :milestone, m4, 339, 341
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 用户在这里会遇到 主架构 的分支。
好的，我把它画成一个矩形框，名字叫 '主架构'，对吧？
[系统日志: Editor 更新了图表代码以反映上述结构]
